SourceProxy.label: SHYX Shape Smoothing
SourceProxy.name: SHYXShapeSmoothing

Documentation.short_help: Switchable triangle-mesh smoothing using CGAL PMP (smooth_shape / angle_and_area_smoothing / fair).

SourceProxy.Documentation:
Smooths a triangulated vtkPolyData with one of three CGAL algorithms: - Shape MCF (smooth_shape, mean curvature flow) with optional rescaling (do_scale) for approximate volume preservation; - Angle & Area (angle_and_area_smoothing) with optional reprojection on the input surface (do_project) which keeps the overall shape/volume close to the input even with few constraints; area-based smoothing requires Ceres at build time; - Fair (bi-Laplacian fairing) on a vertex range, driven by Fairing Continuity. Vertices outside the chosen range act as boundary conditions, exactly preserving everything else.
Constrained vertices come from the same threshold-based feature extraction as SHYX Adaptive Isotropic Remesher: sharp edges via Protection Angle (signed dihedral side filter optional), and an optional Feature Mask (point/cell array threshold) which drops sharp edges leaving the mask, adds mask-region boundary edges as feature edges, and contributes sharp endpoints inside the mask threshold patch as anchor positions snapped within Anchor Tolerance of the bounding box length.
Output port 0: smoothed surface. Output port 1: feature diagnostic (lines = feature edges, verts = constrained feature vertices).

IntVectorProperty.name: SmoothingMethod
IntVectorProperty.label: Algorithm
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL Polygon Mesh Processing smoothing algorithm. Shape MCF moves vertices along normals using mean curvature; Angle & Area equalises angle/area distributions; Fair solves a bi-Laplacian system on a vertex range (boundary conditions are the unmoved vertices).

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Number Of Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Iterations for Shape MCF and Angle & Area; ignored by Fair (a single linear solve).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ProtectAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Protection Angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Sharp edge angle threshold in degrees. Endpoints of detected sharp edges are constrained (fixed) during smoothing.

IntVectorProperty.name: SharpFeatureSideFilter
IntVectorProperty.label: Sharp side filter
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Optional filter on interior sharp edges using signed dihedral angle (CGAL approximate_dihedral_angle). Boundary edges are unchanged. If convex/concave looks swapped, flip mesh orientation or pick the other entry.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: AnchorTolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Anchor Tolerance (relative)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Relative tolerance (fraction of input AABB longest side) used when snapping anchor positions onto the working mesh. Used only when Feature Mask is ON.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskEnabled
IntVectorProperty.label: Feature Mask
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON: a tuple-magnitude threshold on a point/cell array defines the active region. Sharp edges leaving the mask are dropped, mask-region boundary edges are added as feature edges, and sharp endpoints of the mask threshold patch contribute anchor positions.

StringVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of a point- or cell-centered array. If both exist with the same name, cell data is used. Tuple magnitude must be > Threshold for a cell (or per-point corner) to pass.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Threshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Cells pass when tuple magnitude is strictly greater than this value. Typical: 0.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskAllScalars
IntVectorProperty.label: All Scalars
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When the chosen array is point-centered: if ON, every corner of a cell must pass the magnitude test; if OFF, one passing corner is enough. Ignored when the array resolves to cell data.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ShapeTimeStep
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Time Step
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL smooth_shape `time` parameter. Larger = faster convergence, more distortion. Typical 1e-6 to 1.

IntVectorProperty.name: ShapeDoScale
IntVectorProperty.label: Preserve volume (do_scale)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation:
CGAL smooth_shape `do_scale`: rescale the mesh after each iteration to compensate for the volume shrinkage of mean curvature flow.
IMPORTANT: CGAL only applies this rescaling when BOTH conditions hold: (1) the mesh is closed (`CGAL::is_closed`, no boundary loops); and (2) at most one vertex is constrained.
Otherwise CGAL silently skips it and the surface keeps shrinking. Open meshes (e.g. a pipe with inlet/outlet boundaries) hit (1); typical sharp-feature constraints from Protection Angle / Feature Mask hit (2). For volume-like preservation on open meshes and/or with many constraints, switch Algorithm to 'Angle & Area' and keep 'Reproject on input (do_project)' = ON, or use 'Fair' with 'Mask region only'.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseAreaSmoothing
IntVectorProperty.label: Use area smoothing (Ceres)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `use_area_smoothing`. Requires Ceres at build time (CGAL_PMP_USE_CERES_SOLVER). Without Ceres CGAL prints a warning and disables it; the angle path still runs.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseSafetyConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Use safety constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `use_safety_constraints`: reject moves that would worsen the smallest angle or create self-intersections.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseDelaunayFlips
IntVectorProperty.label: Use Delaunay flips
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `use_Delaunay_flips`: finish each area-smoothing pass with Delaunay edge flips.

IntVectorProperty.name: DoProject
IntVectorProperty.label: Reproject on input (do_project)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `do_project`: after each iteration, reproject vertices on an AABB tree built from the input triangles. Main shape/volume-preservation knob for angle_and_area_smoothing.

IntVectorProperty.name: FairingContinuity
IntVectorProperty.label: Fairing continuity
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL fair `fairing_continuity`. Higher continuity needs more fixed boundary vertices.

IntVectorProperty.name: FairScope
IntVectorProperty.label: Fair scope
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Vertex range passed to CGAL fair. "All non-constrained" fairs every non-feature vertex (the mesh must have constraints, otherwise CGAL would shrink it to the origin). "Mask region only" fairs only vertices fully inside the Feature Mask region (requires Feature Mask ON).

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Copy attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, point/cell data are copied onto the smoothed mesh.
